source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Glue Soak
upgrades.description: Glue soaks through all layers of Bloon.

upgrades.name: Corrosive Glue
upgrades.description: Glued Bloons pop one layer every few seconds.

upgrades.name: Bloon Dissolver
upgrades.description: Can glue one additional Bloon per shot and solvents melt two layers every second.

upgrades.name: Bloon Liquefier
upgrades.description: Applies liquifying compounds that do 10 pops every second, and drops powerful acid onto the track after destroying a Bloon.

upgrades.name: The Bloon Solver
upgrades.description: Bloons a problem? Here's the solution.

upgrades.name: Glue Splatter
upgrades.description: Splatters glue across up to 5 Bloons per shot.

upgrades.name: Glue Hose
upgrades.description: Shoots glue 3x as fast and in a wider area!

upgrades.name: Glue Strike
upgrades.description: Glue Strike Ability: Glues all Bloons on screen, causing them to take more damage from all sources while it lasts.

upgrades.name: Glue Storm
upgrades.description: Glue Storm Ability: Pelts the whole screen with glue for 10 seconds.

upgrades.name: Stickier Glue
upgrades.description: Makes glue effect last much longer.

upgrades.name: MOAB Glue
upgrades.description: Improved glue formula allows it to stick to MOAB-Class Bloons.

upgrades.name: Relentless Glue
upgrades.description: When a glued Bloon is popped, nearby Bloons are stunned.

upgrades.name: Super Glue
upgrades.description: Glue so strong it temporarily immobilizes all affected Bloons!
